headlines.title: UW Cherry Blossoms Reach Peak Bloom
headlines.summary: The University of Washington's iconic cherry blossom trees reached peak bloom on March 20, 2026. The 29 Yoshino cherry trees on the UW Quad are now in full display, marking the arrival of spring in Seattle.

headlines.title: Landslide Blocks Northbound I-5 Near Bellingham
headlines.summary: A landslide blocked all northbound lanes of I-5 near Bellingham late Thursday night (March 19), closing the highway just north of North Lake Samish Drive. Approximately 3,000 cubic yards of debris covered the roadway.

headlines.title: Blazing Bagels Closing All Locations Amid Bankruptcy
headlines.summary: Beloved Seattle bagel chain Blazing Bagels is closing all locations after filing for Chapter 7 bankruptcy. The company, which operated five locations across the Seattle area, cited rising costs and decreased foot traffic.

headlines.title: West Seattle Recycle/Reuse/Shred Event Today
headlines.summary: The West Seattle Junction Association is hosting a free recycling and shredding event today from 9 AM to 1 PM at the Junction Plaza Park. Residents can bring documents for shredding and items for recycling.

headlines.title: Hero Passenger Stops Bus After Driver Medical Emergency
headlines.summary: A King County Metro bus passenger is being hailed as a hero after taking control of the bus when the driver suffered a medical emergency in downtown Seattle. No injuries were reported.

weather.forecast: Partly sunny with slight chance of rain
